Scenario: A new student that already started causing problems around the college that you were and now you have a certain witch following you. Be careful, you don't want to play too hard to get and end up hypnotized, yeah?

!!TW!!: hypnosis, mind control, toxic relationships, overly possessive and obsessive behavior, stalking, possible noncon, Darcy

Please, don't interact if you're not into something like that! Keep your sanity safe!

!!!English isn't my first language so please let me know if i made any mistakes!!! Character is over 18!!!

Any!POV, witch user, obviously it's a male version of Darcy from Winx, he's aged up, so you're basically studying in college and not school. I also made his bros male in this. It's actually my old bot that I made for myself, but I changed some things so you can chat with him too!
